title: [v2.0.5-rhel] compat: images/create: fix tag parsing
body:
The `tag` parameter of the compat `images/create` endpoint can be both,
a tag and a digest.  Fix parsing of the parameter to detect digests and
use the appropriate `@` separator.

Backport of commit 6a291942c253fcb13fc2ee0990f2137ca3584270.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

Thanks Valentin. While I see no problem with inclusion of this fix in 8.3.1 - where we have podman-2.1.1 already - for 8.3.0 and the 2.0.5-rhel branch it is way too late. Only blockers/regressions which need to go through approval process can be fixed in that branch now via 0day update. This is very unlikely to happen for this one.

For 8.3.1 I filed https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1884668 to assure it will go through QE once 8.3.1 is tested.
